sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME name, PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.CONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CONNECTTIME, C.SEQUENCE, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.CONNECTIP, C.CONNECTBROWSER, C.CONNECTOS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C INNER JOIN TBL_USERLOCALINFO U ON C.USERID = U.USERID WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# AND U.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID#
ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#
SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CONNECTTIME < SUBDATE(DATE(NOW()), #v_KEEP_LOG_PERIOD#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='useIPAccess' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ACCESS_IP (TENANT_ID, IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION) VALUES (#tenantID#, #ipAddress#, #access#, #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ACCESS_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CONCAT(TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, '(', TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN, ')') CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME=#companyID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CONCAT(TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, '(', TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN, ')') CN, TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2 DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME=#companyID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CONCAT(TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, '(', TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN, ')') CN, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1=#companyID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CONCAT(TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, '(', TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN, ')') CN, TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1=#companyID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
